text:
我ながら特訓らしい特訓を用意できて
胸が熱くなっちゃったよー。

あなたのカタナも熱くてジンジン
きちゃったんじゃない？

これ以上の特訓はないと思ってたけど
もう１回、熱い訓練用メニューを
用意したくなっちゃったなー。

I'll tell you, I really outdid myself this
time! Wasn't that a treat!

I bet that katana of yours enjoyed a taste of
that action!

I thought I'd never be able to top that one,
but seeing you work out there has inspired me
to try and come up with another heart pounder.

I'll whip up something great, I promise, so be
sure to drop by again.
